content: User feedback 1: Progress bar fills in blue during run (bg-info utility added)
User feedback 2a: Optimizer saves best as full backtest_run (with trades+equity+walkforward); 'View Best in Lab' button links to it
User feedback 2b: 3 export buttons (Config JSON, Result JSON, Alts CSV) on Optimizer
User feedback 2c: 'Saved Presets' panel on Optimizer page + 'Load Preset' dropdown in Backtest Lab
User feedback 3: Stop button on running optimization + cancellation persists best so far
Phase 3.5 (feedback fixes): End-to-end testing with testing_agent_v3
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + OPTIONS BACKTEST (weekly expiry, paired INDEX+OPTION legs)
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + What-If + Telegram
